announce.text: Indonesia's Integrated Coconut Processing Company — Export Ready Since 2020

hero.sub: HANCOCO is Indonesia's integrated coconut processing company — transforming raw coconuts into premium B2B commodities for global markets.

glance.headline: Built for Global B2B Trade
glance.description: Since 2020, HANCOCO has grown from a regional processor to an integrated coconut enterprise serving buyers across three continents.

story.headline: Where Nature Meets Industrial Excellence.
story.p1: HANCOCO was born from a simple but powerful belief: that Indonesia's vast coconut resources deserve a processor that honors their full potential. Founded in 2020, we built an integrated supply chain that stretches from farmer partnerships in Sulawesi and Sumatra to export docks serving buyers in Asia, the Middle East, and Europe.
story.p2: We don't just process coconuts. We engineer commodities that meet the precise technical demands of international B2B buyers — consistent quality, complete documentation, and a supply chain built for reliability.

ecosystem.headline: From Farm to Global Customer — Every Step, In-House.
ecosystem.description: Our end-to-end capability means you deal with one trusted partner across the entire value chain — no intermediaries, full traceability.

products.headline: Four Products. One Integrated Source.
products.description: Premium coconut commodities — each one export-ready, laboratory-tested, and available for B2B bulk inquiry.

manufacturing.headline: Industrial Precision. Consistent Output.
manufacturing.description: Our processing facility operates with modern machinery, stringent process controls, and a quality-first culture — built to reliably serve B2B contracts at scale.

qa.headline: 7-Stage Quality Protocol.
qa.description: Every product that leaves our facility has passed a rigorous, documented quality control process — so you receive exactly what you ordered.

sustainability.headline: Nothing Wasted. Everything Valued.
sustainability.description: The coconut tree is called 'The Tree of Life' for a reason. Our integrated processing model ensures every part — meat, shell, husk, water — is transformed into economic and environmental value.

pillars.title: Zero-Waste Processing
pillars.description: Copra meal → animal feed. Shell → charcoal. Husk → coir fiber. Water → supplement.

pillars.title: Farmer Community Support
pillars.description: Direct partnerships empower 200+ coconut farming families with fair pricing and training.

pillars.title: Environmental Commitment
pillars.description: Solar-assisted drying reduces fossil fuel usage across our production lines.

pillars.title: Long-Term Value Chain
pillars.description: Building a coconut industry that sustains Indonesia's agricultural communities for generations.

global.headline: Reaching Buyers Across Three Continents.
global.description: Our export network spans Southeast Asia, the Middle East, and Europe — with logistics capability via Belawan, Tanjung Priok, and Makassar ports.

innovation.headline: 10 Products in Our Pipeline.
innovation.description: Our R&D roadmap extends beyond current offerings — developing the next generation of coconut-derived commodities.

certifications.headline: Compliance You Can Trust.
certifications.description: Our certification status reflects our commitment to transparency. We only display what we hold.

insights.headline: Intelligence for Coconut Commodity Buyers.
insights.description: Market intelligence, export knowledge, and product deep-dives — published for B2B procurement teams.

partnership.headline: Looking for a Reliable Coconut Supplier?
partnership.description: We partner with manufacturers, importers, distributors, and industrial buyers across the globe. If your business works with coconut-derived commodities, let's talk.

rfq.headline: Start Your Inquiry Today.
rfq.description: Fill in the form and our sales team will respond within 24 business hours with pricing, specifications, and availability.

form.messagePlaceholder: Packaging preferences, Incoterms, target purchase date...

manifesto.headline: We Process Coconuts. We Build Supply Chains. We Power Industries.

hero.headline: Building the Future of Coconut, Responsibly.
hero.subheadline: Founded in Indonesia in 2020, HANCOCO transforms coconuts into premium products through integrated processing, responsible sourcing, and circular economy principles—creating sustainable value for industries, communities, and global markets.

whyWeExist.headline: Every Coconut Deserves a Greater Purpose.
whyWeExist.copy:
HANCOCO was founded with one belief: every coconut holds greater potential than what we see today.

By integrating responsible sourcing, modern processing, and continuous innovation, we create products that deliver value while supporting people, industries, and the environment.

whyIndonesia.headline: Rooted in Indonesia's Natural Strength.
whyIndonesia.copy: Indonesia is home to one of the world's richest coconut resources. This natural abundance inspires us to create products that reflect quality, reliability, and the strength of Indonesian agriculture.

whyCoconut.headline: One Resource. Endless Possibilities.
whyCoconut.copy: A coconut is more than a single product. It is a source of food, energy, industrial materials, and future innovation. We believe every part deserves to be transformed into meaningful value.

circularEconomy.headline: Nothing Wasted. Everything Valued.
circularEconomy.copy: We maximize every part of the coconut through an integrated value chain that reduces waste, improves efficiency, and creates long-term benefits for farmers, customers, and the environment.

timeline.title: HANCOCO was established in Indonesia.
timeline.desc: Starting with a vision to maximize local agricultural potential, our founders built the foundation of an integrated coconut processing network in Sulawesi.

timeline.title: Strengthened partnerships with coconut farmers.
timeline.desc: We bypassed middlemen to work directly with over 200 farming families, ensuring fair trade practices and securing a consistent, high-quality raw material supply.

timeline.title: Expanded processing capabilities.
timeline.desc: Invested heavily in modern machinery and standardized drying facilities, significantly increasing our monthly production capacity to 500 tons.

timeline.title: Supplied customers across domestic markets.
timeline.desc: Established a strong reputation for reliability and quality consistency among top-tier domestic manufacturers and industrial buyers.

timeline.title: Strengthened export readiness.
timeline.desc: Achieved vital operational certifications and began forging strategic partnerships with international distributors in the Middle East and Asia.

timeline.title: Building a global coconut ecosystem.
timeline.desc: Operating as a fully integrated B2B supplier, delivering premium White Copra, Black Copra, Charcoal, and Oil to clients across three continents.

vision.headline: Looking Beyond Today's Industry.
vision.copy: To become one of the world's most trusted integrated coconut processing companies by transforming every coconut into sustainable value for global markets.

mission.headline: Guided by Purpose.
points: Deliver premium products with consistent quality.
Build lasting partnerships with coconut farmers.
Expand Indonesian excellence to global markets.
Create sustainable economic, social, and environmental impact.

values.headline: The Values That Shape Every Decision.

points.title: Quality First
points.desc: We never compromise on the technical specifications and consistency of our commodities. Excellence is our standard.

points.title: Integrity
points.desc: Transparency in our sourcing, processing, and business dealings forms the bedrock of our long-term partnerships.

points.title: Innovation
points.desc: We constantly explore better methods to process coconuts, reduce waste, and develop higher-value derivatives.

points.title: Sustainability
points.desc: We honor the Tree of Life by maximizing every part of the coconut and protecting the environment that sustains us.

points.title: Partnership
points.desc: We grow by helping our clients grow, fostering collaborative relationships rather than transactional exchanges.

points.title: Continuous Improvement
points.desc: From factory floors to logistics, we relentlessly refine our operations for maximum efficiency and safety.

points.title: Customer Commitment
points.desc: Our B2B buyers rely on our supply chain. We honor that trust with reliable, on-time deliveries globally.

points.title: Global Mindset
points.desc: Rooted in Indonesia, but built to meet the rigorous demands and diverse needs of international markets.

leadership.headline: A Vision for the Future.
leadership.copy: We believe the future of the coconut industry will be built through collaboration, innovation, and responsibility. HANCOCO is committed to growing alongside our partners while delivering products and relationships built on trust.

lookingAhead.headline: Expanding the Possibilities of Every Coconut.
lookingAhead.copy: Our journey continues through the development of higher-value coconut derivatives, advanced processing technologies, and stronger partnerships that create sustainable growth for generations to come.

global.headline: From Indonesia to the World.
global.copy: We proudly serve domestic and international markets with premium coconut products, consistent quality, and reliable supply building partnerships that grow stronger over time.

final.headline: Every Coconut Holds Potential.
final.copy: At HANCOCO, we see every coconut as an opportunity to create lasting value. Together with our partners, we are shaping a more sustainable future through quality, innovation, and responsible growth.

hero.headline: Where Nature Meets Industrial Excellence.
hero.copy: Every premium product begins with a disciplined manufacturing process. At HANCOCO, we combine responsible sourcing, modern processing, and rigorous quality control to deliver coconut products that meet the expectations of domestic and international markets.

philosophy.headline: Manufacturing Built Around Quality, Also Quantity.
philosophy.copy:
Our manufacturing philosophy is simple: every stage of production should add value while preserving quality, consistency, and efficiency.

From sourcing raw materials to final packaging, every process is designed to support reliable products and long term partnerships.

cards.title: Responsible Sourcing
cards.desc: Working with trusted coconut farming communities.

cards.title: Precision Processing
cards.desc: Standardized workflows for consistent results.

cards.title: Export Readiness
cards.desc: Products prepared to meet international market requirements.

cards.title: Continuous Improvement
cards.desc: Constant refinement of processes and operational standards.

flow.headline: From Coconut Harvest to Global Markets.
flow.copy: Our integrated production workflow ensures every coconut is handled with care, precision, and traceability.

facility.headline: Designed for Efficiency. Built for Consistency.
facility.copy:
Our facilities are continuously developed to improve operational efficiency while maintaining product quality and workplace safety.

Every production area is organized to support smooth workflows and reliable manufacturing performance.

equipment.headline: Supporting Precision at Every Stage.
equipment.copy: Reliable manufacturing depends on reliable equipment. HANCOCO continuously invests in production systems that improve consistency, productivity, and operational efficiency.

cards.title: Processing Equipment
cards.desc: Advanced machinery for breaking down and extracting coconut materials.

cards.title: Drying Systems
cards.desc: Controlled environments to maintain optimal moisture levels.

cards.title: Packaging Equipment
cards.desc: Automated and semi-automated systems for secure containment.

cards.title: Material Handling
cards.desc: Efficient movement of goods across the production floor.

cards.title: Storage Facilities
cards.desc: Climate-managed areas to preserve product integrity.

cards.title: Export Loading Equipment
cards.desc: Heavy-duty machinery for safe container stuffing.

qc.headline: Quality Is Built Into Every Process.
qc.copy: Quality assurance is integrated throughout our production workflow not inspected only at the end. Each stage is monitored to ensure product consistency before shipment.

warehouse.headline: Ready for Reliable Global Distribution.
warehouse.copy: Proper storage, careful packaging, and organized logistics ensure every shipment leaves our facility in optimal condition.

safety.headline: Responsible Manufacturing for Long-Term Impact.
safety.copy: Manufacturing excellence is measured not only by productivity but also by responsibility. HANCOCO continuously improves resource efficiency while supporting sustainable operations across the value chain.

future.headline: Preparing for Tomorrow's Opportunities.
future.copy: As market demand evolves, HANCOCO continues expanding its capabilities to develop higher-value coconut derivatives and strengthen its integrated manufacturing ecosystem.

final.headline: Manufacturing Built for Lasting Partnerships.
final.copy: Whether you are sourcing premium coconut products or exploring long-term manufacturing collaboration, HANCOCO is ready to support your business with reliable production, consistent quality, and responsible practices.
final.note: "From responsible sourcing to export ready manufacturing, every process at HANCOCO is designed to deliver quality you can trust and partnerships that last."

hero.headline: Growing Together. Creating Value That Lasts.
hero.copy: Sustainability is more than protecting natural resources. It is about creating long-term value for farmers, customers, communities, and future generations. At HANCOCO, every decision is guided by responsibility, innovation, and respect for nature.

philosophy.headline: Sustainability Begins with Every Decision.
philosophy.copy:
At HANCOCO, sustainability is integrated into the way we source, produce, and grow. We believe that responsible business creates stronger partnerships, healthier ecosystems, and greater opportunities for future generations.

Every coconut we process represents our commitment to balancing economic growth with environmental and social responsibility.

cards.title: Responsible Business
cards.desc: Building long-term value through ethical and transparent practices.

cards.title: Shared Growth
cards.desc: Creating opportunities that benefit farmers, partners, and communities together.

cards.title: Future Focus
cards.desc: Investing in sustainable solutions that support tomorrow's industries.

circular.headline: Nothing Is Wasted. Everything Creates Value.
circular.copy: Every part of the coconut has the potential to become a valuable product. Through our integrated circular economy approach, we maximize resources, reduce waste, and create sustainable opportunities across the entire value chain.

highlights.title: Responsible Sourcing
highlights.desc: Building trusted relationships with coconut farmers.

highlights.title: Long-Term Impact
highlights.desc: Creating economic and environmental value together.

farming.headline: Strong Communities Build Strong Supply Chains.
farming.copy:
Behind every premium product are dedicated farming communities. HANCOCO believes long-term partnerships begin by supporting those who cultivate the resources we depend on.

By working closely with local farmers, we aim to strengthen livelihoods while improving consistency, quality, and sustainable agricultural practices.

manufacturing.headline: Manufacturing with Purpose.
manufacturing.copy:
Responsible manufacturing means using resources efficiently, maintaining consistent quality, and continuously improving operational performance.

We believe manufacturing excellence should create value not only for customers, but also for people and the environment.

environmental.headline: Protecting Nature Through Better Practices.
environmental.copy: Nature provides the foundation of our business. Protecting it is essential to our future. HANCOCO continuously seeks ways to improve efficiency, optimize resource use, and support responsible environmental stewardship throughout our operations.

cards.title: Resource Efficiency
cards.desc: Using resources more responsibly.

cards.title: Waste Reduction
cards.desc: Creating value from every coconut component.

cards.title: Continuous Improvement
cards.desc: Seeking better ways to reduce environmental impact.

cards.title: Long-Term Responsibility
cards.desc: Growing sustainably for future generations.

social.headline: Creating Opportunities That Grow Together.
social.copy: Sustainability is measured by the positive impact we create for people. HANCOCO believes meaningful partnerships contribute to stronger communities, shared prosperity, and long-term business resilience.

ahead.headline: Building Tomorrow's Coconut Industry.
ahead.copy:
Our sustainability journey continues through innovation, stronger partnerships, and the development of higher-value coconut products that maximize natural resources while supporting global market needs.

We believe the future belongs to businesses that create lasting value for both people and the planet.

final.headline: Building a More Sustainable Future, Together.
final.copy: Every partnership is an opportunity to create lasting value. Together with our customers, suppliers, and communities, we are shaping a more responsible and sustainable future for the global coconut industry.
final.note: "Sustainability is not the destination of our journey—it is the way we choose to move forward, together."

office.headline: Find Us.
office.address: Indonesia — complete address to be added

items.q: What is your minimum order quantity?
items.a: Our standard MOQ is 1 × 20ft container. We also accommodate larger orders (40ft / 40ft HC). Final MOQ depends on product type and destination.

items.q: Do you provide product samples?
items.a: Yes. We provide samples for qualified buyers after initial inquiry review. Sample lead time is approximately 7–14 business days.

items.q: What payment terms do you accept?
items.a: We accept T/T (Telegraphic Transfer) and L/C (Letter of Credit). Terms are finalized during the quotation stage.

hero.headline: Frequently Asked Questions.
hero.copy: Everything you need to know about HANCOCO's products, export process, quality standards, and partnership opportunities.

items.q: What is HANCOCO?
items.a: HANCOCO is an integrated coconut processing company based in Indonesia, established in 2020. We produce and export premium coconut-derived commodities including White Copra, Black Copra, Coconut Charcoal, and Coconut Oil for B2B and industrial buyers worldwide.

items.q: Where is HANCOCO located?
items.a: Our processing facilities and head office are located in Indonesia. We export primarily through major Indonesian ports including Belawan (North Sumatra) and Tanjung Priok (Jakarta).

items.q: Is HANCOCO a manufacturer or a trader?
items.a: HANCOCO is a fully integrated processor and manufacturer — not a trader or broker. We own and operate our processing facilities, giving buyers direct access to the source of production with full quality control.

items.q: What certifications does HANCOCO hold?
items.a: We currently hold Halal certification. ISO, HACCP, and GMP certifications are in progress (Coming Soon). We update our certification status regularly on our Corporate Resources page.

items.q: What languages do you operate in?
items.a: Our team operates in Bahasa Indonesia and English. All export documentation, product specifications, and communications are available in English.

items.q: What products does HANCOCO offer?
items.a: Our current active product range includes: White Copra (low moisture, food-grade), Black Copra (industrial grade), Coconut Charcoal (BBQ/hookah/industrial briquettes), and Coconut Oil (RBD/Virgin). Additional products including Desiccated Coconut, Coconut Fiber, and VCO are in our development pipeline.

items.q: Can I request custom specifications?
items.a: Yes. We accommodate custom moisture content, ash content, fixed carbon levels (for charcoal), particle size, and packaging configurations based on buyer requirements and minimum order volumes.

items.q: What is the shelf life of your products?
items.a: Shelf life varies by product: Copra (6–12 months in proper storage), Coconut Charcoal (24+ months), Coconut Oil (12–24 months). We provide storage guidelines with each shipment.

items.q: Do you offer organic or certified organic products?
items.a: We source from coconut farms in Indonesia. Organic certification is part of our product roadmap. Contact our team to discuss specific compliance requirements for your market.

items.q: How do you ensure product quality consistency?
items.a: Our 7-stage Quality Control process covers Incoming Inspection, Production Monitoring, Sampling, Laboratory Testing, Moisture & Weight Check, Pre-Shipment Inspection, and Final Approval. Each batch is documented and traceable.

items.q: Can buyers arrange third-party inspection?
items.a: Yes. We welcome pre-shipment inspection by accredited third-party agencies (SGS, Bureau Veritas, Intertek, etc.). Arrangements should be communicated at the order confirmation stage.

items.q: What are your production capacity figures?
items.a: We can provide detailed capacity data during the quotation and due diligence stage. Our facilities are scalable to support both spot orders and long-term supply contracts.

items.q: What trade terms (Incoterms) do you support?
items.a: We support FOB (Free On Board), CIF (Cost, Insurance & Freight), and CFR (Cost and Freight). The preferred Incoterm is agreed upon during the quotation stage based on your destination port and requirements.

items.q: Which ports do you ship from?
items.a: Our primary export ports are Belawan (Medan, North Sumatra) and Tanjung Priok (Jakarta). Port selection depends on the specific product and logistics optimization.

items.q: What container sizes are available?
items.a: We ship in 20ft Standard, 40ft Standard, and 40ft High Cube (HC) containers. The optimal container type depends on product density and volume.

items.q: How long is the lead time from order to shipment?
items.a: Typical production-to-shipment lead time is 14–30 days from Purchase Order confirmation, subject to order volume and current production schedule. Lead times are confirmed during the quotation process.

items.q: What is the RFQ process?
items.a: 1. Browse our products and add items to the RFQ Cart. 2. Complete the RFQ form with your company details, volume requirements, and destination port. 3. Our team reviews and responds with an official quotation within 1–3 business days. 4. Upon agreement, we issue a Proforma Invoice and proceed to order confirmation.

items.q: What is the minimum order quantity (MOQ)?
items.a: Our standard MOQ is 1 × 20ft container (~18–25 MT depending on product). Larger volume orders receive priority processing and may qualify for preferential pricing.

items.q: Can I order multiple products in one RFQ?
items.a: Yes. Our RFQ system supports multi-product inquiries. Simply add all desired products to your RFQ Cart before submitting.

items.q: Does HANCOCO offer exclusive distribution agreements?
items.a: Yes, we explore exclusive and preferred distribution arrangements in strategic markets. Partnership terms depend on volume commitments, market coverage, and alignment with HANCOCO's brand standards.

items.q: How do I become a long-term supply partner?
items.a: Contact our Business Development team via the Contact page or submit an inquiry with 'Partnership' as your inquiry type. We'll arrange an introductory call to explore the opportunity.

still.headline: Still Have Questions?
still.copy: Our team is available to address specific inquiries about products, export processes, or partnership opportunities.

hero.headline: Export-Ready. Anywhere in the World.
hero.copy: From our processing facilities in Indonesia to your destination port — HANCOCO manages a complete, professional export process built for B2B commodity trade.

process.headline: Our Export Process.
process.copy: A structured, transparent 8-stage process from order confirmation to port delivery.

steps.title: RFQ & Quotation
steps.desc: Buyer submits RFQ. Our team responds with an official quotation including pricing, Incoterms, lead time, and documentation checklist.

steps.title: Order Confirmation
steps.desc: Buyer confirms the order via Purchase Order (PO). Proforma Invoice (PI) is issued by HANCOCO for payment processing.

steps.title: Production & Processing
steps.desc: Product is manufactured or prepared to specification. Quality checks are conducted at each production stage.

steps.title: Quality Inspection
steps.desc: Pre-shipment inspection by HANCOCO QC team. Third-party inspection available upon buyer request (SGS, Intertek, etc.).

steps.title: Container Loading
steps.desc: Product is packed, weighed, and loaded into containers (20ft / 40ft / 40ft HC) following international cargo standards.

steps.title: Port & Customs
steps.desc: Customs clearance at Indonesian export port. All required export documents are processed and verified.

steps.title: Ocean Freight
steps.desc: Shipment departs from Belawan or Tanjung Priok port. Buyer is notified with vessel name, voyage number, and ETA.

steps.title: Document Delivery
steps.desc: Full shipping documentation package delivered to buyer: B/L, Commercial Invoice, Packing List, Certificate of Origin, and others.

ports.headline: Export Ports & Container Capacity.
ports.copy: Strategic port access for efficient delivery to Asian, Middle Eastern, European, and American markets.

items.desc: HANCOCO delivers goods to the origin port and loads them onto the vessel. Buyer assumes risk and freight costs from that point. Most common term for experienced importers.
HANCOCO covers shipping cost and insurance to the destination port. Buyer takes ownership upon arrival. Preferred by buyers who want end-to-end simplicity.
HANCOCO covers freight to destination port but the buyer arranges their own cargo insurance. A balance between FOB and CIF.

items.name: Bill of Lading (B/L)
items.desc: Primary shipping document confirming cargo loaded onto vessel.

items.name: Commercial Invoice
items.desc: Official invoice detailing product, quantity, price, and trade terms.

items.name: Packing List
items.desc: Detailed list of all packages, weights, and dimensions.

items.name: Certificate of Origin (COO)
items.desc: Certifies that goods originate from Indonesia (for preferential tariff treatment).

items.name: Phytosanitary Certificate
items.desc: Issued by government authority confirming product meets destination country health standards.

items.name: Halal Certificate
items.desc: HANCOCO-held Halal certification for applicable products.

items.name: Fumigation Certificate
items.desc: Confirms cargo has been treated to meet import country biosecurity requirements.

items.name: Third-Party Inspection Report
items.desc: Available upon request — issued by SGS, Intertek, or Bureau Veritas.

markets.headline: Global Shipping Coverage.
markets.copy: We ship to 15+ countries across Asia, the Middle East, Europe, and beyond.

return.headline: Return & Claim Policy.
return.copy: We are committed to delivering products that meet agreed specifications. In the rare case of a quality dispute, our structured resolution process ensures fair and prompt resolution.

steps.title: Report the Issue
steps.desc: Buyer submits a formal claim within 14 days of cargo arrival, supported by photos, lab analysis, and inspection report.

steps.title: Investigation
steps.desc: HANCOCO QC team reviews the claim against our pre-shipment inspection records and production documentation.

steps.title: Resolution
steps.desc: Resolution may include replacement shipment, credit note, or price adjustment — agreed mutually based on investigation findings.

final.headline: Ready to Ship With Us?
final.copy: Our export team is ready to guide you through the entire process — from RFQ to delivery.

hero.headline: Source Premium Coconut Commodities.
hero.copy: Export-ready products from Indonesia's integrated coconut processor. Browse our range and submit your Request for Quotation.

products.name: White Copra
products.desc: High-quality white copra with controlled moisture content, suitable for coconut oil extraction and food processing industries worldwide.

products.name: Black Copra
products.desc: Industrial-grade black copra processed for large-scale coconut oil production. Suitable for refining processes where color is not critical.

products.name: Coconut Charcoal
products.desc: High fixed-carbon coconut shell charcoal briquettes for BBQ, hookah/shisha, and industrial applications. Consistent heat, low ash, long burn time.

products.name: Coconut Oil
products.tagline: Refined coconut oil for food & industrial use
products.desc: High-purity RBD (Refined, Bleached, Deodorized) coconut oil for food manufacturing, cosmetics, and industrial applications.

products.name: Cocopeat / Coir Pith
products.tagline: Sustainable growing medium from coconut husk
products.desc: Premium cocopeat (coir pith) — a natural, sustainable growing medium with excellent water retention properties for horticulture and agriculture.

products.name: Desiccated Coconut
products.tagline: Fine-cut dried coconut for food industry
products.desc: Premium desiccated coconut in fine, medium, and coarse grades for bakeries, confectioneries, and food manufacturers.

hero.headline: Privacy Policy
hero.copy: HANCOCO is committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring that your personal information is handled securely and responsibly.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.body:
We may collect the following information:

* Full name
* Company name
* Email address
* Phone number
* Country and business location
* Product inquiries and messages
* IP address and browser information
* Website usage data through cookies and analytics

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.body:
We use your information to:

* Respond to inquiries and quotation requests.
* Process business communications.
* Improve our products and services.
* Enhance website performance and user experience.
* Send updates, newsletters, or promotional information (only if you choose to receive them).
* Comply with applicable legal obligations.

sections.title: 3. Cookies
sections.body:
Our website may use cookies and similar technologies to improve functionality, analyze website traffic, and enhance your browsing experience.

You may disable cookies through your browser settings, although some website features may not function properly.

sections.title: 4. Information Sharing
sections.body:
HANCOCO does not sell, rent, or trade your personal information.

We may share information only with trusted service providers who assist in operating our website or business, or when required by applicable law.

sections.title: 5. Data Security
sections.body:
We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction.

While we strive to use commercially acceptable methods to protect your information, no internet transmission or electronic storage system can be guaranteed to be completely secure.

sections.title: 6. Data Retention
sections.body: We retain personal information only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this Privacy Policy or to comply with legal and regulatory requirements.

sections.title: 7. Third-Party Services
sections.body:
Our website may contain links to third-party websites or use third-party services such as analytics providers or communication platforms.

These third parties have their own privacy policies, and HANCOCO is not responsible for their privacy practices.

sections.title: 8. Your Rights
sections.body:
Depending on applicable laws, you may have the right to:

* Access your personal information.
* Correct inaccurate information.
* Request deletion of your personal data.
* Withdraw consent for marketing communications.
* Request information regarding how your data is processed.

To exercise these rights, please contact us using the contact details below.

sections.title: 9. Children's Privacy
sections.body:
Our products and services are intended for businesses and individuals aged 18 years or older.

We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

sections.title: 10. Changes to This Privacy Policy
sections.body:
We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time.

Any revisions will be posted on this page with the updated revision date. Continued use of our website after changes are published constitutes acceptance of the revised Privacy Policy.

sections.title: 11. Contact Us
sections.body:
If you have any questions regarding this Privacy Policy or how your personal information is handled, please contact us through our official Contact page or business email.

Thank you for trusting HANCOCO.

hero.headline: Terms & Conditions
hero.copy: Welcome to HANCOCO. By accessing or using our website, products, or services, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions.

sections.title: 1. About HANCOCO
sections.body: HANCOCO is an Indonesian company specializing in the sourcing, processing, and export of high-quality coconut products. Our mission is to deliver sustainable, traceable, and export-grade coconut solutions for customers worldwide.

sections.title: 2. Use of Website
sections.body:
You agree to use this website only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms. You must not:

* Use the website for fraudulent or unlawful activities.
* Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems.
* Distribute malware, viruses, or harmful software.
* Copy, reproduce, or redistribute website content without written permission.

sections.title: 3. Product Information
sections.body:
We strive to ensure all product descriptions, specifications, and images are accurate. However, natural agricultural products may vary slightly in appearance, color, size, moisture content, or other characteristics.

All information provided is subject to change without prior notice.

sections.title: 4. Orders & Quotations
sections.body: All purchase orders, quotations, and pricing are subject to confirmation by HANCOCO. We reserve the right to accept, reject, or cancel any order due to product availability, pricing errors, regulatory requirements, or other business considerations.

sections.title: 5. Pricing & Payment
sections.body:
Prices are provided based on agreed quotations and may change depending on market conditions, raw material availability, logistics costs, or exchange rate fluctuations.

Payment terms will follow the agreement stated in the sales contract or proforma invoice.

sections.title: 6. Shipping & Delivery
sections.body:
Delivery schedules are estimates and may be affected by weather conditions, shipping lines, customs clearance, port congestion, or force majeure events.

HANCOCO is not responsible for delays beyond our reasonable control.

sections.title: 7. Export Compliance
sections.body: Buyers are responsible for complying with import regulations, permits, customs requirements, taxes, and product standards in their destination country unless otherwise agreed in writing.

sections.title: 8. Intellectual Property
sections.body: All content on this website—including text, logos, graphics, product images, documents, and branding—is the property of HANCOCO and may not be used without prior written permission.

sections.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
sections.body: To the fullest extent permitted by law, HANCOCO shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from the use of this website, products, or services.

sections.title: 10. Force Majeure
sections.body: HANCOCO shall not be liable for delays or failure to perform obligations resulting from events beyond reasonable control, including natural disasters, pandemics, government actions, labor disputes, war, transportation disruptions, or other force majeure events.

sections.title: 11. Third-Party Links
sections.body: Our website may contain links to third-party websites for your convenience. HANCOCO is not responsible for the content, policies, or practices of those external websites.

sections.title: 12. Changes to Terms
sections.body: We may update these Terms & Conditions at any time without prior notice. Continued use of our website after changes are published constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

sections.title: 13. Governing Law
sections.body: These Terms & Conditions shall be governed by and interpreted in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Indonesia.

sections.title: 14. Contact Us
sections.body: If you have any questions regarding these Terms & Conditions, please contact us through the Contact page or via our official business email.
